case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MIGUEL BANUELOS BENITES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. DEFENDANT MIGUEL BANUELOS BENITES IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENITES, MIGUEL BANUELOS $822.46 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $902.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JUL-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENITES, MIGUEL BANUELOS
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL BANUELOS BENITES IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE SWORN IN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $822.46 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BENITES, MIGUEL BANUELOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
